Gonzalo Lobos

Business Strategy, Web Development & Applied Artificial Intelligence.

Bridging business administration with modern frontend architectures and autonomous AI agents to maximize business conversion.

View Recent Work
Contact

About Me

I am a professional passionate about merging business strategy and technology. Throughout my career, I have led high-demand e-commerce initiatives for global brands, focusing on designing memorable user experiences (UX/UI) that not only retain customers but skyrocket conversion rates.

My approach integrates advanced analytics with technical development. I drive data-backed decision-making using Google Analytics 4, Search Console, and BrightEdge. Within the development ecosystem, I master frontend engineering with React and Tailwind CSS, enabling me to prototype and deploy ultra-fast interfaces.

My key differentiator is the ability to automate business processes through Artificial Intelligence, a milestone consolidated with the creation of OSCAR: an autonomous commercial agent integrated with large language models (Gemini AI) that acts as a Single Source of Truth (SSoT). I possess the professional background and interpersonal skills required to act as a linguistic and strategic bridge between technical teams, clients, and commercial business units.

I am looking to join innovative teams focused on digital growth. If you are seeking a technical profile with a business mindset and AI expertise, let's connect.

Recent Projects

AI Engineering & DevOps • Commercial Automation & Cybersecurity

OSCAR: Autonomous Sales Agent & AI Infrastructure

Node.jsGemini AI (Tools)Hetzner VPSCoolify (DevOps)Meta Cloud APISHA-256 Cybersecurity

Description:

End-to-end design, development, and deployment of an intelligent conversational assistant (SDR) and centralized API architecture. The system securely interconnects the Official WhatsApp API (Meta), Chatwoot, and the Cal.com v2 API using Function Calling with Gemini 2.5 Flash. The entire ecosystem is containerized and independently hosted on a Hetzner VPS managed via Coolify, ensuring high availability and low latency.

Key Results:

  • Advanced Cryptographic Security: Implementation of SHA-256 signature validation on Webhooks to mitigate fraudulent requests.
  • Single Source of Truth (SSoT): Dual architecture that feeds the WhatsApp bot and the indexable official website frontend in real time (SEO with Schema.org).
  • Automated Governance (Human-in-the-Loop): Dual safety net featuring an analog handbrake ('human intervention') and an intelligent string-truncation system to prevent exceptions in Meta's API.
  • Multi-Stage Consultative Logic: SDR algorithm prioritizing the lead's technical diagnosis and active listening before enabling scheduling features.
View Project →
AI Engineering & DevOps • Commercial Automation & Cybersecurity

OSCAR: Autonomous Sales Agent & AI Infrastructure

Node.jsGemini AI (Tools)Hetzner VPSCoolify (DevOps)Meta Cloud APISHA-256 Cybersecurity

Description:

End-to-end design, development, and deployment of an intelligent conversational assistant (SDR) and centralized API architecture. The system securely interconnects the Official WhatsApp API (Meta), Chatwoot, and the Cal.com v2 API using Function Calling with Gemini 2.5 Flash. The entire ecosystem is containerized and independently hosted on a Hetzner VPS managed via Coolify, ensuring high availability and low latency.

Key Results:

  • Advanced Cryptographic Security: Implementation of SHA-256 signature validation on Webhooks to mitigate fraudulent requests.
  • Single Source of Truth (SSoT): Dual architecture that feeds the WhatsApp bot and the indexable official website frontend in real time (SEO with Schema.org).
  • Automated Governance (Human-in-the-Loop): Dual safety net featuring an analog handbrake ('human intervention') and an intelligent string-truncation system to prevent exceptions in Meta's API.
  • Multi-Stage Consultative Logic: SDR algorithm prioritizing the lead's technical diagnosis and active listening before enabling scheduling features.

Branding & Web Development • International Logistics & Courier

2V Express

ReactBrandingCorporate ChannelsCorporate Identity

Description:

Comprehensive development of a corporate identity and digital ecosystem for a company specializing in surplus removal. The project ranged from strategic brand definition (branding) to the technical enablement of professional communication channels and a high-authority web platform, delivering operational consistency across every touchpoint.

Key Results:

  • Creation of a complete visual identity (Logo and Style Guide)
  • Corporate digitalization: Configuration of corporate emails, signatures, and communication tools
  • Optimized web development to project industry solidity in a low-turnover industrial sector

Web Development & Portfolio • Art Direction & International Cinema

Claudia Gallardo

ReactArt DirectionCinema & SeriesAuteur Portfolio

Description:

Portfolio development for an Art Director with an international career. The project consisted of creating a high-impact digital showcase to organize a prominent filmography across platforms like Netflix, HBO, and Prime Video. The architecture centered on a cinematographic aesthetic that projects the status of a Pedro Sienna Award winner.

Key Results:

  • Information architecture designed to highlight world-class productions
  • Minimalist and sophisticated interface that gives center stage to the visual work
  • Asset optimization for smooth loading of high-resolution galleries
View Project →
Web Development • Earthmoving & Construction

Lobos Mini Excavators

ReactTailwind CSSLocal SEOIndustrial Services

Description:

Development of a high-performance digital infrastructure for the industrial sector. We transformed the online presence into a local lead generation machine, prioritizing loading speed on-site (WPO) and a technical architecture that projects the brand's operational solidity.

Key Results:

  • Strategic conversion optimization for machinery rental
  • Ultra-fast interface (WPO) designed for optimal performance in low-signal field conditions
  • Authority positioning in the Aconcagua Valley market
View Project →

Gonzalo Lobos

ReactOrganizational PsychologyStrategic BrandingConsulting

Description:

Digital ecosystem design for a high-level personal brand. The project synthesizes a career in organizational psychology with business management tools, creating a platform that balances humanism and technical robustness to attract corporate clients.

Key Results:

  • Unification of strategic narrative and visual style system
  • Web architecture optimized for personal authority positioning
  • Structure oriented toward capturing high-value B2B clients

Corporate Web Development • Legal Services & Complex Litigation

Brkovic Law Firm

ReactTailwind CSSDigital InfrastructureLegal Sector

Description:

Development of a premium institutional web platform for a law firm with over 30 years of experience in high complexity and human rights. The ecosystem was designed under a clean and solemn architecture that organizes multiple specialized practice areas, balancing institutional seriousness with optimized conversion flows.

Key Results:

  • Modular architecture for indexing and breaking down complex areas (Justice, Human Rights, and Community Defense)
  • Strategic integration of immediate response channels and direct advisory via WhatsApp
  • Advanced performance optimization (WPO) through preloading of critical assets for friction-free navigation
View Project →

Case Studies

Digital Campaign Management

E-commerceCampaign ManagementUX/UIApp

Problem:

Need to execute multiple simultaneous campaigns across web and app platforms to boost sales.

Objective:

Orchestrate over 30 annual campaigns, ensuring a consistent user experience.

Actions:

  • Planning and execution of the annual commercial campaign calendar.
  • Cross-functional coordination with design, development, and marketing teams.
  • Constant performance monitoring and optimization.

Key Results:

  • Successful execution of campaigns, resulting in high annual sales volume.
  • Improvement in purchase frequency and user interaction.

Digital Campaign Management

E-commerceCampaign ManagementUX/UIApp

Problem:

Need to execute multiple simultaneous campaigns across web and app platforms to boost sales.

Objective:

Orchestrate over 30 annual campaigns, ensuring a consistent user experience.

Actions:

  • Planning and execution of the annual commercial campaign calendar.
  • Cross-functional coordination with design, development, and marketing teams.
  • Constant performance monitoring and optimization.

Key Results:

  • Successful execution of campaigns, resulting in high annual sales volume.
  • Improvement in purchase frequency and user interaction.

SEO Order Growth

SEOGoogle AnalyticsContentSchema

Problem:

Identified a growth opportunity in the organic channel, which had an order share below the brand's potential.

Objective:

Increase visibility and sales share from the organic channel through a content and technical optimization strategy.

Actions:

  • Keyword optimization (primary and long-tail keywords).
  • Implementation of FAQ sections on product pages.
  • Use of structured data (Schema) for enhanced search engine visibility.

Key Results:

  • Double-digit growth in sales driven by the organic channel.
  • Significant increase in the channel's order share within the total sales mix.

Pickup Channel Optimization

OmnichannelUXOperations

Problem:

The "Boutique Pickup" service was inconsistent, unavailable in 100% of stores, and caused user confusion.

Objective:

Implement and standardize the "Boutique Pickup" service across all stores to unify the omnichannel experience.

Actions:

  • Service rollout to all boutique locations nationwide.
  • Training of in-store teams on the new operational flow.
  • Optimization of communication channels for real-time order monitoring.
  • Drafting and optimization of transactional notification emails to secure pickup completion.

Key Results:

  • Notable increase in the adoption rate of the pickup modality.

SEM Campaign Launch and Management

SEMGoogle AdsPerformanceConsulting

Problem:

Launch a client's presence in Google Ads to generate highly qualified traffic and drive initial conversions.

Objective:

Implement an SEM strategy from scratch, configure conversion tracking, and obtain initial data insights.

Actions:

  • Keyword research and comprehensive competitor analysis.
  • Structuring account architecture and ad groups within Google Ads.
  • Configuration and testing of conversion events.
  • Initial campaign management, bidding management, and optimization.

Key Results:

  • Obtained the client's first conversion events.
  • Successful validation of the full-funnel performance model.

Experience

Expansis Pro

Digital Strategist & Founder

0 years and 0 months

Key Responsibilities:

  • Leadership and overall direction of Expansis Pro, a digital solutions firm focused on strategic and operational business optimization.
  • Digital Strategy Design: Defining technological roadmaps for businesses looking to scale their online presence and maximize conversions.
  • Operational Consulting: Applying efficiency methodologies and excellence standards to digital processes, leveraging high-level operational experience.
  • Digital Project Management: End-to-end supervision of platform development, ensuring that architecture and layout align perfectly with client business goals.
  • Strategic Advisory: Providing personalized guidance on implementing digital tools to optimize management and drive business growth.

Ecommerce Merchandising Specialist

Nestlé Nespresso SA

Dec 2021 – Apr 2026 (4 years and 5 months)

Toolbox

Strategy & Business

My vision for impacting business goals.

E-commerce Strategy

Roadmap definition, P&L management, and leadership of high-impact campaigns (Cyber Day, Black Friday).

Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

Sales funnel analysis, A/B testing (Optimizely), and continuous improvement of user experience (UX/UI).

Digital Marketing & SEO

Organic positioning strategies, SEM, and marketing automation for customer loyalty (CRM).

Digital Project Management

Coordination of multidisciplinary teams for the execution of technological and commercial projects.

AI Automation & Governance

Design of autonomous agents (SDR), multi-stage logical workflows, and hybrid customer service architectures (Human-in-the-Loop).
